headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Intuitive Surgical at around US$452 is offering good value right now, or if the price already reflects most of its strengths, this article breaks down what the current market tag might and might not be pricing in. The stock has been broadly flat over the last year with a 0.1% return, while it shows a 76.0% return over 3 years and 72.9% over 5 years. More recent periods have been softer, with a 7.8% decline over 30 days and a 19.6% decline year to date. Recent...
